reference: Doctor, my girlfriend has been tormented by her pregnancy due to pills. Now, after ten days, she has a lot of headache and pain in her womb. She is feeling very unwell; please help us. Blood came from her ear yesterday four times, and this morning once. I gave her a Ciprofloxacin pill, and she took one, but the headache remains, although blood has not come again.
text: Doctor, my girlfriend has been tormented by her pregnancy due to pills. Now, after 10 days, she has a lot of headache and pain in her wound. She is feeling very unwell. Please help us. Blood came from her ear yesterday 4 times, and this morning once. I gave her a ciprofloxacin pill, and she took one. But the headache remains, although blood has not come again.
